Use.title: Stack containers.
Use.subtitle: Flex by default. Absolute when you need it.
Use.inside4: The shared base-attribute surface every node accepts
Use.epigraph: Yoga handles 95% of editorial layout. Reach for Layer only when pixels demand it.
Use.leftMeta: 3 nodes · 1 absolute layout · base attribute set

Use.title: VStack — vertical layout
Use.lede: Stacks children top-to-bottom with a uniform gap. Cross-axis alignment is set via alignItems; main-axis distribution via justifyContent.

VStack.Text: column with three pills, each centred horizontally
three rows distributed across a 140px column

Use.title: HStack — horizontal layout
Use.lede: Mirrors VStack on the row axis. Children share a uniform gap; widths default to flexGrow=1 with flexBasis=0 (equal-share) when the parent has a definite width.

Use.title: Equal-share defaults
Use.body: Children with no w attribute receive flexGrow=1 and flexBasis=0 when the parent HStack itself has a definite width. Set w on each child if you need natural sizing.

VStack.Text: icon + label rendered as a single row

HStack.Text: A row of icon + label uses HStack for vertical alignment.

VStack.Text: three equal columns — no w attr, HStack auto-distributes

Use.title: Layer — absolute placement
Use.lede: An absolutely-positioned container. Each child must declare x and y in pixels relative to the layer's top-left corner. Use it for badges, pixel-precise overlap, or diagrams.

Use.title: Pixel-perfect overlap
Use.body: Badges, rotated annotations, and connector lines that sit on top of cards. Avoid Layer for editorial body content — Yoga flex handles it better.

VStack.Text: three coloured rectangles with explicit x, y

Slot.name: code
Slot.Text: <VStack x="20" y="20" w="200" h="80" backgroundColor="AA2D00" borderRadius="6">…</VStack>
<VStack x="160" y="60" w="200" h="80" backgroundColor="D9A441" borderRadius="6">…</VStack>
<VStack x="300" y="100" w="200" h="80" backgroundColor="0A2E0E" borderRadius="6">…</VStack>

Use.title: Base attributes — applicable to every node
Use.lede: Shared attributes every node accepts: sizing, padding, borders, backgrounds, classes, a11y flags. Nodes may add more on top.

Foreach.items: [ {"attr":"backgroundColor","type":"color","desc":"6-digit hex (with optional #)."}, {"attr":"backgroundImage","type":"object","desc":"{src, sizing: cover/contain} or dot-notation."}, {"attr":"border","type":"object","desc":"{color, width, dashType} or dot-notation."}, {"attr":"borderRadius","type":"number","desc":"Corner radius in pixels."}, {"attr":"opacity","type":"number","desc":"Background transparency, 0..1."}, {"attr":"shadow","type":"object","desc":"{type, blur, offset, color} drop shadow."} ]

[ {"attr":"position","type":"string","desc":"relative · absolute (defaults to relative)."}, {"attr":"x / y / top / right / bottom / left","type":"number","desc":"Used inside Layer or with position=absolute."}, {"attr":"zIndex","type":"number","desc":"Stack order (higher draws on top)."}, {"attr":"class","type":"string","desc":"Space-separated names matching <Style name=\"…\"/>."}, {"attr":"isDecorative","type":"boolean","desc":"Sets altText=\"\" so screen readers skip the node."} ]

VStack.Text: Even Text and Icon accept padding, backgroundColor, and borderRadius — chips and pill buttons without an extra wrapper.
